TextView.android:text: EXPAND A PHASE — TAP A ROW
Eliminate every deterministic crash, ABI mismatch, and miscompile so the browser launches and runs reliably.
Zero known deterministic crashes at startup or steady-state
All critical codegen / ABI findings resolved or verified
Bring up hardware-accelerated raster and compositing on the Tegra GPU with correct vsync and surface lifetimes.
Re-enable the sandbox and site isolation on the 32-bit target. Blocked on a seccomp policy gap under the Tegra kernel.
